key_facts: You tiao (fried dough) on red plate

key_hits: Congee / rice porridge correctly identified
Soft-boiled egg with bright orange yolk
Green onions / scallions, cilantro, ginger, fried shallots, soy sauce
Youtiao on red plate identified by name
Steaming glass of soy/warm milk on wooden coaster
Dark wooden chopsticks
Marble table
key_misses: Said 'soft-boiled egg' rather than explicitly sunny-side-up / runny yolk (minor)
Did not explicitly call soy milk (said 'likely warm milk or soy milk')
hallucinations: Mentions 'matching off-white ceramic spoon' — spoon handle is light colored and may not be ceramic (minor)
judgments.justification: Excellent comprehensive description. Identified congee by name, youtiao by name, marble table, red plate, chopsticks, steaming glass. Only minor imprecision on the exact yolk state and the milk identity.

key_misses: Did not explicitly call youtiao by name

judgments.justification: The fabricated 'shredded meat / pork floss / bacon' is a clear hallucination not present in the image. Description is otherwise decent but the hallucination plus omission of youtiao name drags the score down.
